original: Jezzy’s Blaster
Jezzy’s blaster
a blaster pistol taken from Jezzy

This pistol once belonged to Jezzy, but after the defeat of the drugged-up gabilani, it’s fallen into your service. At a glance, it resembles common laser weapons found throughout the rim, but it’s been upgraded with an aftermarket power-supply and custom-cut refraction crystals to put out far more power than its off-the-shelf cousins. A lightweight composite frame keeps it extra-light in the hand - easy enough for a slight girl to hold onto in battle. It won’t slow down your attempts to dodge.

Jezzy’s Hat
Jezzy’s hat
a hat taken from Jezzy

This loose-fitting stocking cap, sometimes known as a toque, once belonged to the infamous Gabilani drug-runner Jezzy. Now it’s yours: proof of victory over the short-stacked drug-dealer. Maybe it will help you handle illicit substances a little better?

Short but definitely not sweet, the foul-mouthed gabilani stands closer to three feet tall than four - short by the standards of her sex. Her true height, however, is hard to parse, as her head is covered with a loose toque, with holes cut out for her many-times-over pierced ears to poke through. Half naked, she’s wearing an oversized hoodie, unzipped and shrugged down off her shoulders, with it sagging down to her waist. Underneath, she’s stuffed into a white tank top a few sizes too small, the overburdened fabric barely covering her titanic titties. Her nipples strain against the fabric, revealing them to both be pierced with fat studs.\n\nJezzy’s bottom half is completely bare, exposing (and showing off) her very round and well-shaped hips and butt. Between her sinfully thick thighs stands a mighty - and very clearly modded - cock. The massive slab of meat is vaguely equine in shape, with two heavy balls hanging below to fuel it. The sight of it almost distracts you from the blaster she’s holding in one hand, and an oversized club she wields in the other. A belt slung around her waist carries a wide array of threats and dangers, which she seems eager to test on you.
